text: Handling deadlines is an important skill in both study and work. Good time management helps you plan your tasks and avoid last-minute stress. Start by breaking big projects into smaller steps and setting clear deadlines for each part. Prioritization is also key—focus first on the most urgent or important tasks. Additionally, learn scope management: if a task grows bigger than expected, say no to extra requests or adjust your plan. Finally, always communicate with your team or manager. If you see a deadline may be missed, tell them early. Honest communication builds trust and gives you time to find solutions together.
